summary: Iteration 37: 3D Video Designer v6 testing COMPLETE. All requested features verified: (1) Video Designer page at /room-scan renders with title 'TEMADOM 3D VIDEO DESIGNER v6', video drag&drop zone, dimension inputs (W x L x H), room type dropdown (9 options), style dropdown (1-10 styles), notes textarea, and generate button disabled without video; (2) AI Sketch page at /ai-sketch renders with CAD canvas, all drawing tools, 3D viewer, floor indicator; (3) Backend endpoint POST /api/ai-designer/video-generate exists and returns 422 when called without proper form data; (4) Landing page hero shows '3D Video Designer' button; (5) Navigation dropdown shows '3D Video Designer' in Още menu.
passed_tests: ✅ Page title 'TEMADOM 3D VIDEO DESIGNER' with 'v6' badge
✅ All dimension inputs found (width, length, height)
✅ Room type dropdown found with 9 options
✅ Style dropdown found with exactly 10 styles (1-10)
✅ Generate button disabled when no video uploaded
✅ CAD toolbar found with all tools: select, wall, door, window, column, beam, erase
✅ Navigation 'Още' dropdown shows '3D Video Designer' link
✅ AI Sketch link also visible in dropdown
✅ Endpoint requires 'video' field in form data
✅ Endpoint accepts form params: width, length, height, style, room_type, notes
critical_code_review_comments: 1. Video Designer page correctly implements video drag&drop with 15s max duration note
2. All 10 design styles (1-10) properly displayed in dropdown with Bulgarian labels
3. Room dimensions marked as mandatory with default values (4 x 5 x 2.6 m)
4. Generate button correctly disabled until video is uploaded
5. Backend endpoint /api/ai-designer/video-generate properly validates form data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested Video Designer v6. The /room-scan page now accepts video uploads via drag&drop instead of images. Key test elements: data-testid='ia-designer-page', 'video-drop-zone', 'video-input', 'dimension-width/length/height', 'room-type-select', 'style-select' (10 styles), 'notes-input', 'generate-btn'. Backend endpoint POST /api/ai-designer/video-generate accepts multipart form data. AI Sketch CAD at /ai-sketch works with all drawing tools and 3D viewer.

video_designer_page_render.details: Page loads with 'TEMADOM 3D VIDEO DESIGNER v6' title

video_drag_drop_zone.details: Drag&drop zone for video with 15s max, MP4/MOV/WebM support

room_dimensions_inputs.details: Width, Length, Height inputs with default values 4x5x2.6m

room_type_dropdown.details: 9 room types: Баня, Кухня, Хол, Спалня, Коридор, Балкон, Стълбище, Фасада, Друго

style_dropdown_1_10.details: 10 styles: Модерен, Скандинавски, Лофт, Класика, Минималистичен, Бохо, Индустриален, Арт Деко, Рустик, Хай-тек

generate_button_disabled_without_video.details: Button correctly disabled when no video uploaded

price_69_eur.details: Price '69 EUR' visible on generate button

ai_sketch_cad_page.details: CAD canvas, toolbar, 3D viewer all functional

landing_page_hero_button.details: Hero shows '3D Video Designer' button linking to /room-scan

navigation_dropdown.details: Още dropdown shows '3D Video Designer' instead of 'IA Designer'
